.02

DISCOVER

Explore the world of the Metaverse, mine and be partners with the Space Cowboys. Under full canvas Space Pirates, cross the limits!

CREATE

Create your own planet. Play with your digital reflection as a Space Cowboy. Mint your exploration beyond the boundaries!

PLAY

Joy of playing is priceless. Level up by constructing and harvesting. Harvest and gather bounties in Metagalactic Universe.

EARN

Exchange $MEGALAND on DEX/CEX. Sell your loot on Metagalactic NFT Marketplace. Transfer the assets you earn in the game to the real world as a valuable resource.

adventure?

Buy NFT and be a planet owner Space Cowboy or rather choose to be Space Pirate in the debris zone and seal alliances With the planets against others.

CHOOSE
YOUR
SIDE!

SPACE PIRATES SPACE COWBOYS
SPACE PIRATES

Space Pirates are freelancers who can establish their own clans and guilds and act as the armies and expedition crews of individual space cowboys. They discover, combat, scavenging, mining, expeditions, trade, ship customization.

SPACE cowboys

Cowboys own their planet NFTs and can terraform, manufacture high value goods, construct planetary and interplanetary manufacturing lines, forging ships, forming fleets, building megaprojects, claim rewards and forming Federations.

    .09
    FAQ
    Got questions about METAGALAXY?
    We have got answers. Check it out!
    What is Metagalaxy Land?

    MetaGalaxy Land is a next generation blockchain based MetaFi metaverse experience platform. Our investors able create and exchange their own customized planets as NFTs and participate the metaverse as Space Cowboys, or they can choose to be trader as Space Pirates with its freemium feature.

    What are MEGALANDs?

    MEGALANDs are Metagalaxy Land's governance token. We define $MEGALAND token as resource of our metagalactic universe. So, this token will be used for in-metaverse transactions such as constructing, leveling up and trade.

    What's special power of Metagalaxy Land?

    Metagalaxy Land represents the new future beyond the borders of your mind. We combine the power of the future with the Blockchain technology and the infinity of new generation to create a metaverse beyond our dreams. We believe in a future where work and play become one and empowering our players while giving them economic opportunities with our play-to-earn add-ons.

    Will the Metagalaxy Land game be 2D or 3D?

    We had planned for our game to develop as 2D, but the game will be isometric as we have shifted some of our drawings to 3D as we aim to reach the highest satisfaction for NFT and Game Experience.

    Is MetaGalaxy Land a good investment?

    Actually, it's a decision you have to make. MetaGalaxy is a constantly growing and developing project and aims to be here for the long run. We are committed to working for our investors and their thoughts are very crucial to us. In this process, we empathize and put ourselves in the position of investors and answer any questions they may have.

    Where can I interact with & meet other community members?

    Please join our Discord server where you can meet the rest of the community! You can find the rest of our channels here.

    How can I contribute to Metagalaxy Land?

    Everyone can contribute to Metagalaxy Land. Some popular ways to contribute our big family:
    Creating guides for new investors/players.
    Creating Metagalaxy Land fan art and sharing it.
    Creating tools that help the community play more efficiently.
    Starting an Metagalaxy Land Youtube video series or podcast
    Shilling Metaglaxy Land.
    Telling your friends about Metagalaxy Land.
